name: Crab and Asparagus Soup (Vietnam)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut onions into 1-inch lengths, including part of the green tops.
2. Make 2 (1/4-inch thick) slices from a piece of ginger root.
3. Bring broth, chopped onions, ginger slices, and bouillon to a rapid boil.
4. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 1 hour.
5. Strain the broth through a fine mesh sieve to remove any fat or solids.
6. Add crab meat to the strained broth.
7. Cut asparagus spears into thirds and add them to the broth.
8. Simmer gently, uncovered, for an additional 10 minutes.
9. Beat eggs in a small bowl until just combined with water.
10. Slowly pour the beaten eggs into the soup while stirring gently but continuously.
11. Serve 6 portions of soup, garnished with cilantro sprigs.
